Electronic Press Kit

Apebreeder

Rock — The Democratic Republic of Negros

About

Apebreeder is a three-man propaganda unit spouting third world resentment pieces against the modern world from The Democratic Republic of Negros.

Formed in 2022 across Bacolod and Dumaguete, the trio — Jared on guitars and vocals, Miggy on bass, and Ed on drums — built their catalog from the ground up. Primarily self-recorded and self-produced, with mixing and mastering handled at a studio. Seventeen songs deep into the argument. Still not finished.

The songs are voices from the underneath — the ones usually sequestered, left unspoken. Unapologetic and unhygienic in subject, executed with genuine musical craft. Not lazy music. It sublimates the raw dreadfulness of existence into something potent — soul-stirring to those with the right coordinates.

Apebreeder leaves songs the way a persistent sore does — present, unresolved, and not particularly interested in your approval.

Press

"A focused unit with something to say... the chaotic combination of fuzzed-out guitars, frantic rhythms, eclectic tempo and dynamic changes and a healthy dose of sonic punk rock sensibilities — alongside space-y vocals and cheeky, nihilistic lyricism — is definitely a rarity among rock music these days."

PULP Magazine · 2025

"A sonic force that vehemently rejects the status quo... a cathartic journey through the shadows of discontent, an unapologetic expression of raw emotion."

Rank The Mag · 2023
